name: Mung-Ata Kavum
recipeInstructions:
Batter Preparation: Beat an egg, place the rice flour in a bowl and add salt. Gradually mix in enough warm water to form a thick batter.
1. In a pan, heat jaggery and water until boiling.
2. Gradually add rice flour and mung gram flour, stirring continuously.
3. Cook until the mixture thickens, then remove from heat.
4. Cool the mixture on a greased board and knead well.
5. Gradually incorporate warm water to achieve a soft and smooth consistency.
6. Shape the dough into diamond forms and dip in the batter.
7. Heat oil for frying and deep fry until crisp and golden brown.
8. Remove from oil and drain excess fat.
(Note: "Turn off" the heat source when cooking is complete.)
